title: fagara subserrata
intro: Fagara subserrata, also known as Zanthoxylum bungeanum, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rutaceae, commonly found in East Asia and known for its aromatic leaves and berries. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties, which are attributed to the presence of alkaloids and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Fagara subserrata include its ability to relieve pain, reduce fever, and aid in digestion, making it a popular remedy for various ailments. Fagara subserrata is often used in herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
